title: Pudding’s Betrayal Is Revealed
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Big Mom, Pedro, Brook, Pudding as Sanji learns the truth about Pudding and Big Mom’s plan while the crew looks for a way out.
scene: The truth behind Pudding and Big Mom’s plan breaks Sanji’s hope, while the crew gathers critical information and allies.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But you won't be able to defeat these three!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Every last part of him is Bones, and yet he's alive ...a miracle!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your fighting was quite wonderful, too, soul king.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Are absolutely terrified of you! Mama- Mama...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: To think, the soul king himself. You're their archenemy!

dialogue.speaker: Pedro
dialogue.text: I've given them my soul directly!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The level of their souls is completely different!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: And there's nothing in the cylinder either~

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: Then I guess everything's okay, soul King!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Leave alone the TAMATebako... even a rubbing of the poneglyph...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's no way I'd let any of that stuff get stolen from under my nose!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If someone were to make off with those things and find their way to rafflel again...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I'd look like an idiot, right?! hahaha!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I won't ever make the same mistake I did back then with Roger!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He used some strange power that involved hearing "The voice of all things" or something to read that damn thing...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But we've got our own ace-in-the- hole that'll one day develop that same power, though...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're gonna be the next ones to make it to raffle!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: OH! My cute pudding! I was just talking about you, and here you are!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What's the matter? Did your third eye manage to achieve true opening?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ughhh, come on Mama! That's all you ever talk about!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I'm a half- breed, you know!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There isn't even any guarantee that I'll ever awaken such a power anyway!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: HAAAHAHA! Sorry.. but there's no denying

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The fact that you've got the blood of the strange three-eye tribe running in your veins!

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: Hagh... P- Pudding is a three- eyes?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ah... mustn't let on that we're ac- quainted...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That bone-man made it all the way out here?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Well, he's been captured. Should be fine.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Say, Mama! I want to talk to you about something, but it's a bit embarrassing to say here. Can we go to your room?

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Betrayal Revealed storyline with 61 dialogue beats. Pudding’s deception and Big Mom’s intentions become clear, changing the rescue from infiltration to survival.
